Blocks.Execute: DECLARE @StartInterval date = DateFromParts(YEAR(@StartDate), MONTH(@StartDate), 1); DECLARE @EndInterval date = EoMonth(@EndDate);

With.Name: Main

Cte.Name: SalesAnalysisBaseCte

Else.Query: CROSS JOIN (SELECT 0 AS Transactions) AS Accumulated

With.Cte: SELECT {{ -Fields -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Dimension:Calendar -WithPrimaryKey:true -WithComma }} Sales, SUM(IsNull(Sales, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Additional YearMonth -OrderBy Date }} ) AS SalesStartToDate, SUM(IsNull(Sales, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Additional YearMonth }} ) AS SalesMonth, SalesTaxesIncluded, SUM(IsNull(SalesTaxesIncluded, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Additional YearMonth -OrderBy Date }}) AS SalesTaxesIncludedMonthToDate, SUM(IsNull(SalesTaxesIncluded, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -OrderBy Date }}) AS SalesTaxesIncludedStartToDate, SUM(IsNull(SalesTaxesIncluded, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Additional YearMonth }}) AS SalesTaxesIncludedMonth, SalesTaxesExcluded, SalesQuantityNoRefund, SUM(IsNull(SalesQuantityNoRefund, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -OrderBy Date }} ) AS SalesQuantityNoRefundStartToDate, SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefund, SUM(IsNull(SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefund, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -OrderBy Date }} ) AS SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefundStartToDate, Transactions, SUM(IsNull(Transactions, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -OrderBy Date }} ) AS TransactionsStartToDate, SalesTarget, SUM(IsNull(SalesTarget, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Additional YearMonth -OrderBy Date }} ) AS SalesTargetMonthToDate, SUM(IsNull(SalesTarget, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -OrderBy Date }} ) AS SalesTargetStartToDate, SUM(IsNull(SalesTarget, 0)) OVER ({{ -PartitionBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Additional YearMonth }}) AS SalesTargetMonth, AssignedHours FROM SalesTargetCte

Else.Cte: SELECT NULL AS Date, NULL AS YearMonth, NULL AS InternalCustomerFlow, NULL AS ExternalCustomerFlow

With.Cte: SELECT {{ -Fields -Dimension:Users -Table:SalesFirst -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Table:SalesFirst -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Table:SalesFirst -Dimension:Products -Table:SalesFirst -Dimension:Calendar -Table:SalesFirst -WithPrimaryKey -WithComma }} --[SalesFirst].[Date], [SalesFirst].[YearMonth], -- Ventas € II: Sum(Importe II) SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncluded, -- Ventas € II acm.: Sum(Importe II) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncludedStartToDate AS SalesTaxesIncludedAccumulated, -- Ventas € IE: Sum(Importe IE) SalesFirst.SalesTaxesExcluded, -- Ventas: Sum(Cantidad) SalesFirst.Sales, SalesFirst.SalesStartToDate AS SalesAccumulated, -- Objetivo Ventas € II: Sum(ObjetivoVentas) SalesFirst.SalesTarget AS SalesTargetTaxesIncluded, -- Objetivo Ventas € II acm.: Sum(ObjetivoVentas) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive SalesFirst.SalesTargetStartToDate AS SalesTargetTaxesIncludedAccumulated, {{ -IfRequest -Expression:SalesAchievementPercentage -Sql -- % Consecución Ventas Sum(Importe II) / Sum(ObjetivoVentas) 100.0 * SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncluded / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesTarget, 0) AS SalesAchievementPercentage, }} -- % Consecución Ventas acm: -- Sum(Importe II) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive -- / Sum(ObjetivoVentas) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive 100.0 * SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncludedStartToDate / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesTargetStartToDate, 0) AS SalesAchievementPercentageAccumulated, -- Consecución del mes: -- Sum(Importe II) desde el día 1 del mes de la fecha hasta la fecha, inclusive -- / Sum(<total mes de la fecha> ObjetivoVenta) 100.0 * SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncludedStartToDate / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesTargetMonth, 0) AS MonthlyTargetAchievement, -- Proyección cierre de mes -- [Sum(Importe II mes) mes de la fecha hasta la fecha, inclusive -- / Sum(ObjetivoVentas) desde el día 1 del mes de la fecha hasta la fecha, inclusive] -- * Sum(<total mes de la fecha> ObjetivoVentas) (1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncludedMonthToDate / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesTargetMonthToDate, 0)) * SalesFirst.SalesTargetMonth AS MonthlySalesProjection, -- Participación Ventas € II: -- Sum(Importe II) / Suma(<total filtrado> Importe II) Importe total de la agrupación entre importe total filtrado 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncluded / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncludedMonth, 0) AS SalesParticipationTaxesIncluded, -- Participación Ventas: -- Sum(Cantidad) / Suma(<total filtrado> Cantidad) Cantidad total de la agrupación entre cantidad total filtrada 1.0 * SalesFirst.Sales / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesMonth, 0) AS SalesParticipation, -- Venta por hora calendario: Sum(Importe II) / Sum(HorasCalendario) 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncluded / NullIf(SalesFirst.AssignedHours, 0) AS SalesPerCalendarHour, -- % Evolución semanal: -- [Sum(Importe II) desde el día 1 del mes de la fecha hasta la fecha, inclusive -- / Sum(ObjetivoVentas) desde el día 1 del mes de la fecha hasta la fecha, inclusive] -- - [Sum(Importe II) desde el día 1 del mes de la fecha hasta (la fecha - 7 días) -- / Sum(ObjetivoVentas) desde el día 1 del mes de la fecha hasta (la fecha - 7 días)] CASE WHEN Day(SalesFirst.Date) < 9 THEN NULL ELSE 100.0 * (1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncludedMonthToDate / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesTargetMonthToDate, 0) - 1.0 * SalesPrevious.SalesTaxesIncludedMonthToDate / NullIf(SalesPrevious.SalesTargetMonthToDate, 0)) END AS WeeklyEvolutionPercentage, -- Transacciones: Count(distinct Tickets*) SalesFirst.Transactions, SalesFirst.TransactionsStartToDate AS TransactionsAccumulated, -- Transacciones por hora calendario: Transacciones / Sum(HorasCalendario) 1.0 * SalesFirst.Transactions / NullIf(SalesFirst.AssignedHours, 0) AS TransactionsPerCalendarHour, -- Cesta Media: Sum(Importe II*) / Transacciones* 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefund / NullIf(SalesFirst.Transactions, 0) AS AverageBasket, -- Cesta Media acm.: -- Sum(Importe II*) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive -- / Transacciones* desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefundStartToDate / NullIf(SalesFirst.TransactionsStartToDate, 0) AS AverageBasketAccumulated, -- Precio Medio Sum(Importe II*)/Sum(Cantidad*) 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefund / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesQuantityNoRefund, 0) AS AveragePrice, -- Precio Medio acm.: -- Sum(Importe II*) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive -- / Sum(Cantidad*) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefundStartToDate / NullIf(SalesFirst.SalesQuantityNoRefundStartToDate, 0) AS AveragePriceAccumulated, -- UPT: Sum(Cantidad*) / Transacciones* 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesQuantityNoRefund / NullIf(SalesFirst.Transactions, 0) AS UPT, -- UPT acm.: -- Sum(Cantidad*) desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive -- / Transacciones* desde el inicio del periodo hasta la fecha, inclusive 1.0 * SalesFirst.SalesQuantityNoRefundStartToDate / NullIf(SalesFirst.TransactionsStartToDate, 0) AS UptAccumulated, -- Flujo de clientes externo: Sum(FlujoClientesExterno) CustomersFlowAnalysisCte.ExternalCustomerFlow AS ExternalCustomerFlow, -- Flujo de clientes interno: Sum(FlujoClientesInterno) CustomersFlowAnalysisCte.InternalCustomerFlow AS InternalCustomerFlow, -- Conversión externa: Sum(FlujoClientesInterno) / Sum(FlujoClientesExterno) 100.0 * CustomersFlowAnalysisCte.InternalCustomerFlow / NullIf(CustomersFlowAnalysisCte.ExternalCustomerFlow, 0) AS ExternalConversionRate, -- Conversión interna: Transacciones / Sum(FlujoClientesInterno) 100.0 * SalesFirst.Transactions / NullIf(CustomersFlowAnalysisCte.InternalCustomerFlow, 0) AS InternalConversionRate, -- Jornada Sum(HorasCalendario) + Turno || Descripción de Vacaciones o ausencia || Día libre CAST(SalesFirst.AssignedHours AS nvarchar(50)) AS Worktime, SalesFirst.SalesTaxesIncludedMonth, SalesPrevious.SalesTaxesIncluded AS SalesAmountTaxesPreviousWeek, SalesFirst.SalesQuantityNoRefund, SalesFirst.SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefund, SalesFirst.SalesTargetMonth, SalesFirst.AssignedHours, CASE WHEN Day(SalesFirst.Date) < 9 THEN NULL ELSE SalesPrevious.SalesTarget END AS SalesTargetPreviousWeek FROM SalesAnalysisAccumulatedCte AS SalesFirst {{ -LeftJoin -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Table:SalesAnalysisAccumulatedCte -Dimension:Users -Table:SalesAnalysisAccumulatedCte -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Table:SalesAnalysisAccumulatedCte -Dimension:Products -Table:SalesAnalysisAccumulatedCte -Table:SalesFirst -Alias:SalesPrevious -On:RequestFields -Additional DateAdd(day, -7, SalesFirst.Date) = SalesPrevious.Date AND SalesFirst.YearMonth = SalesPrevious.YearMonth }} {{ -LeftJoin -Relation -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Table:CustomersFlowAnalysisCte -On:RequestFields -Relation -Dimension:Calendar -Table:CustomersFlowAnalysisCte -On:RequestFields -Table:SalesFirst }}
With.Query: SELECT {{ -Fields -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Dimension:Calendar -WithPrimaryKey -WithComma }} SalesTaxesIncluded, SalesTaxesIncludedAccumulated, SalesTaxesExcluded, Sales, SalesTargetTaxesIncluded, SalesTargetTaxesIncludedAccumulated, SalesAchievementPercentage, SalesAchievementPercentageAccumulated, MonthlyTargetAchievement, MonthlySalesProjection, SalesPerCalendarHour, WeeklyEvolutionPercentage, Transactions, TransactionsPerCalendarHour, AverageBasket, AverageBasketAccumulated, AveragePrice, AveragePriceAccumulated, UPT, UptAccumulated, ExternalCustomerFlow, InternalCustomerFlow, ExternalConversionRate, InternalConversionRate, COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount, SUM(SalesTaxesIncluded) OVER () AS TotalSalesTaxesIncluded, NULL AS TotalSalesTaxesIncludedAccumulated, SUM(SalesTaxesExcluded) OVER () AS TotalSalesTaxesExcluded, SUM(Sales) OVER () AS TotalSales, SUM(IsNull(SalesTargetTaxesIncluded, 0)) OVER () AS TotalSalesTargetTaxesIncluded, NULL AS TotalSalesTargetTaxesIncludedAccumulated, {{ -IfRequest -Expression:SalesAchievementPercentage -Sql 100.0 * SUM(SalesTaxesIncluded) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(IsNull(SalesTargetTaxesIncluded, 0)) OVER (), 0) AS TotalSalesAchievementPercentage, }} NULL AS TotalSalesAchievementPercentageAccumulated, 100.0 * SUM(IsNull(SalesTaxesIncludedMonth, 0)) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(IsNull(SalesTargetMonth, 0)) OVER (), 0) AS TotalMonthlyTargetAchievement, NULL AS TotalMonthlySalesProjection, 1.0 * SUM(IsNull(SalesTaxesIncluded, 0)) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(IsNull(AssignedHours, 0)) OVER(), 0) AS TotalSalesPerCalendarHour, NULL AS TotalWeeklyEvolutionPercentage, SUM(Transactions) OVER () AS TotalTransactions, 1.0 * SUM(IsNull(Transactions, 0)) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(IsNull(AssignedHours, 0)) OVER(), 0) AS TotalTransactionsPerCalendarHour, 1.0 * SUM(SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefund) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(Transactions) OVER (), 0) AS TotalAverageBasket, 1.0 * SUM(SalesTaxesIncludedAccumulated) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(TransactionsAccumulated) OVER (), 0) AS TotalAverageBasketAccumulated, 1.0 * SUM(SalesAmountTaxesIncludedNoRefund) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(SalesQuantityNoRefund) OVER (), 0) AS TotalAveragePrice, 1.0 * SUM(SalesTaxesIncludedAccumulated) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(SalesAccumulated) OVER (), 0) AS TotalAveragePriceAccumulated, 1.0 * SUM(SalesQuantityNoRefund) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(Transactions) OVER (), 0) AS TotalUPT, 1.0 * SUM(SalesAccumulated) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(TransactionsAccumulated) OVER (), 0) AS TotalUptAccumulated, SUM(IsNull(ExternalCustomerFlow, 0)) OVER () AS TotalExternalCustomerFlow, SUM(IsNull(InternalCustomerFlow, 0)) OVER () AS TotalInternalCustomerFlow, 100.0 * SUM(IsNull(InternalCustomerFlow, 0)) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(IsNull(ExternalCustomerFlow, 0)) OVER (), 0) AS TotalExternalConversionRate, 100.0 * SUM(Transactions) OVER () / NullIf(SUM(IsNull(InternalCustomerFlow, 0)) OVER (), 0) AS TotalInternalConversionRate FROM SalesAnalysisCte {{ -OrderBy -Dimension:Users -Dimension:UsersPointOfSale -Dimension:PointsOfSale -Dimension:Products -Dimension:Calendar -WithPrimaryKey -Required }} {{ -Pagination }}
